text: These dimly lit, near-empty spaces and sterile glass walls evoke in me a sense of curiosity mixed with subtle unease. The fluorescent blues and technological ambiance whisper of future possibilities, of innovation perhaps—yet, under this cold glow, I also feel a pinch of alienation, as if I'm on the threshold of some unknown experiment, both observer and subject. I wonder what discoveries await, and what it might mean to be a participant in perpetual research and development.
